name: Progressions
description_short: Progressions Credit Union is a member-owned financial institution offering checking, savings, loans, and credit cards with competitive rates and digital banking services.
description_long:
Progressions Credit Union is a member-owned financial cooperative that provides comprehensive banking and lending services to its members. As a credit union, it operates under the regulatory oversight of the NCUA (National Credit Union Administration) and emphasizes member benefits over shareholder profits. The organization has established itself as a full-service financial institution with a physical branch network and digital banking capabilities.

Progressions offers a diverse range of financial products including high-yield checking accounts (Kasasa Cash Back and Kasasa Cash Checking up to 5.00% APY), savings accounts with certificates of deposit (up to 3.75% APY), money market accounts, and specialized savings programs like YES! Savings and Smart Saver Round Up. On the lending side, they provide auto loans (as low as 4.24% APR), home loans (purchase, refinance, and home equity), personal loans, credit builder loans, motorcycle loans, and boat/RV financing. They also issue their own VISA credit cards (as low as 10.99% APR) and offer youth accounts designed for younger members.

Progressions differentiates itself through member-focused services and community involvement. They provide Skip A Pay options, Early ACH Direct Deposit, mobile deposit capabilities, shared branching access through the CO-OP network, text banking, and a FREE Virtual StrongBox for document storage. Their Vehicle Center helps members navigate auto purchasing and financing. They offer member discounts on tax preparation services and financial education resources including calculators and an "Adulting" section. The credit union emphasizes security with a dedicated Security Center and investment protection programs.

While Progressions presents itself as a comprehensive financial institution, potential members should note that membership eligibility requirements exist (details not fully specified on the website). The organization acknowledged technical issues with their It's Me 247 online banking platform at the time of this profile, suggesting occasional service reliability challenges. As a credit union, they operate on a membership model rather than as a traditional bank, which may appeal to some consumers but requires joining their membership base.
services: Kasasa Cash Back Checking with debit card rewards
Kasasa Cash Checking with high APY
Skip A Pay loan deferment service
pros: High-yield checking accounts up to 5.00% APY with Kasasa products, competitive rates
Kasasa Cash Back checking provides debit card rewards, a rare feature among credit unions
Comprehensive loan options including auto, home, personal, and credit builder loans at competitive rates
Shared branching network through CO-OP provides access to additional physical locations beyond their own
Free digital services including mobile deposit, text banking, and virtual document storage (Virtual StrongBox)
Member discounts on tax preparation and insurance products
Youth-focused accounts (SmartKid and SmartTeen) designed for financial education and early banking habits
Skip A Pay service allows members to defer loan payments when facing temporary hardship
cons: Technical issues reported with It's Me 247 online banking platform as of the profile date
Membership eligibility requirements may restrict access compared to traditional banks (specific criteria not clearly detailed on website)
Credit card APR starting at 10.99% is relatively high compared to some competitors
Website does not provide transparent fee schedules for overdraft protection or other account fees
Limited information about membership approval process and eligibility criteria on public website
best_for: Members seeking high-yield checking and savings accounts with competitive APY rates
Consumers interested in auto financing combined with rewards-based checking accounts
Individuals building or rebuilding credit through credit builder loans and secured products
Families looking for youth banking accounts with educational financial management tools
diagnosis: Progressions Credit Union is best suited for consumers seeking a member-owned alternative to traditional banks with competitive rates on both deposits and loans, particularly those interested in high-yield checking accounts or auto financing. The main caveat is that membership eligibility requirements exist and must be met before opening accounts, and potential members should verify their eligibility and be aware of ongoing technical issues with the online banking platform.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
meta_title: Progressions — Credit Union in Spokane, WA | CreditDoc
meta_description: Progressions — NCUA-insured credit union in Spokane, WA. Member-owned, not-for-profit. Loans, savings, and member services.
